## Change

Describe the interoperability or adopter problem and the smallest change that
solves it.

## Contract impact

- [ ] No wire or acceptance-semantic change
- [ ] Protocol version impact documented
- [ ] Provider descriptor version impact documented
- [ ] Security and privacy impact documented
- [ ] Migration impact documented

## Evidence

- [ ] Positive tests added or updated
- [ ] Negative/fail-closed tests added or updated
- [ ] OpenAPI, schemas, conformance vectors, and docs remain aligned
- [ ] No real proofs, nullifiers, stable subjects, or production secrets added
